title: Fresh Desk Analyzer
description: Extract tracking numbers, order numbers, order URLs, classify the ticket category, and generate a summary from customer support tickets

tracking_number_found.description: Whether any tracking numbers were found in the ticket

tracking_numbers.description: Tracking numbers found in the ticket

order_number_found.description: Whether any order numbers were found in the ticket

order_numbers.description: Order numbers found in the ticket

order_urls.description: CMS purchase lookup URLs generated from order numbers

category.description: Primary ticket category selected from the current dropdown options

suggested_new_category.description: If category is OTHER, a short suggested new category label; otherwise an empty string

summary.description: A one paragraph summary of the support ticket starting with 'The customer'

suggested_new_category.description: Provide a short concrete category suggestion when category is OTHER
